title: British Doner Salad
description: A refreshing twist on traditional British cuisine with the addition of a doner kebab. This salad combines fresh flavors with a satisfying crunch.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the doner meat for 5-7 minutes, or until heated through.
In a large bowl, combine the salad, minty leaves, and grilled doner meat.
In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar and olive oil.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
